user.title: SparkyFitness
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your self-hosted SparkyFitness instance. Create an API key in SparkyFitness under Settings, then enter it below.

data_description.url: Full URL to your SparkyFitness server or frontend, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3004
data_description.api_key: An API key generated in SparkyFitness (with health data read permission)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SparkyFitness
reauth_confirm.description: The stored API key is no longer valid. Enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the URL is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key, or the key lacks the required permission.
error.invalid_url: Enter a full URL including http:// or https://

abort.already_configured: This SparkyFitness instance is already configured.
